event.name: Yuri's Night Test Hunt
event.description: A test scavenger hunt covering all checkpoint types. Not a real event — for deployment verification only.

checkpoints._note: Welcome table — first stop, no link on homepage
checkpoints.name: Mission Control
checkpoints.clue: Every great mission starts with a briefing. Find the welcome table to get your launch codes.

contentJson.blurb: Welcome to Yuri's Night! Check in here to officially start your mission. Your score begins now.

checkpoints._note: Physical sponsor table with redirect — tests auto conversion flow
checkpoints.name: Rocket Fuel Co.
checkpoints.clue: The crew runs on this stuff. Find their table near the bar.

contentJson.blurb: Rocket Fuel Co. proudly powers the Yuri's Night crew. Scan to earn points and check out what they're pouring tonight.

checkpoints._note: QR code in printed materials — tests offsite sponsor flow
checkpoints.name: Zero Gravity Apparel
checkpoints.clue: Check your event lanyard — there's a QR code hiding in plain sight.

contentJson.blurb: Zero Gravity Apparel — because your outfit should be as weightless as you feel tonight. Scan the code on your lanyard to visit their site.

checkpoints._note: Standard exhibit with optional question mode — tests EXHIBIT with question + homepage link
checkpoints.name: The Apollo Display
checkpoints.clue: Look for the historic mission display near the main stage.

contentJson.blurb: This exhibit commemorates the Apollo programme and the first humans to walk on the Moon.
contentJson.question: In what year did Apollo 11 land on the Moon?

checkpoints._note: Always-question type — tests trivia flow, always shows link on homepage
checkpoints.name: Cosmonaut Trivia
checkpoints.clue: No QR code needed — answer this from anywhere in the venue.

contentJson.blurb: Think you know your cosmonauts? Prove it.
contentJson.question: What is the name of the first human to travel to space?

checkpoints._note: Homepage link only — tests online sponsor / social follow flow
checkpoints.name: Follow Mission Control
checkpoints.clue: Stay in the loop — follow us online and earn your social explorer badge.

contentJson.blurb: Follow Yuri's Night on social to stay connected with the global space community.

checkpoints._note: End of hunt — tests prize redemption and hunt completion flow
checkpoints.name: Prize Deck
checkpoints.clue: Bring your score to the prize desk to claim your reward. Safe travels, cosmonaut.

contentJson.prizeInstructions: Show this screen to the prize desk crew. They will verify your score and hand over your reward. Well done, cosmonaut — mission complete.
